title: Render the List
description:
The `tasks` array holds four items, but the component renders a single hardcoded `
  • todo
    • `. Render the array into list items with `.map()`, and give each item a `key` prop so React can track them.
objectives: Use `tasks.map(...)` to render one `<li>` per task
hints:
Inside JSX you can render an array of elements: `{tasks.map((task, i) =>
  • {task}
    • )}`.
React uses `key` to identify which items changed. The index works here, though a stable id is better in real apps.

checks.description: Each item has a key prop
checks.failMessage: Add a `key` prop to each rendered `<li>`.
